reviews.review_description: It looks beautiful but where are the other promised destinations for us to explore??
It is very similar to the national geographics explore vr game. I want to see more destinations and the game needs to be more polished. But a good start and I enjoy the short exploration to the east.

developer_response.body: Thank you. We have plann to adding more maps about East destinations in the future.  Whtat kind of polished are you looking for? The graphic, puzzle design or animation?

reviews.review_description: But the locomotion needs to be improved and add smooth rotation.
